'''鈭歫-t-v''' ('''jatava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yume|yume]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yume|yume]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-t-v
|-
! Lemma
| jatava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jatavithi|jatavithi]] || [[word:jataviji|jataviji]] || [[word:jatavishi|jatavishi]] || [[word:jatavi|jatavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatavuthuth|jatavuthuth]] || [[word:jatavujuj|jatavujuj]] || [[word:jatavushush|jatavushush]] || [[word:jatav|jatav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatavuthu|jatavuthu]] || [[word:jatavuju|jatavuju]] || [[word:jatavushu|jatavushu]] || [[word:jatavu|jatavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatavufuth|jatavufuth]] || [[word:jatavufuj|jatavufuj]] || [[word:jatavufush|jatavufush]] || [[word:jatavuf|jatavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jatavethe|jatavethe]] || [[word:jataveje|jataveje]] || [[word:jataveshe|jataveshe]] || [[word:jatave|jatave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatavothoth|jatavothoth]] || [[word:jatavojoj|jatavojoj]] || [[word:jatavoshosh|jatavoshosh]] || [[word:jatav|jatav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatavotho|jatavotho]] || [[word:jatavojo|jatavojo]] || [[word:jatavosho|jatavosho]] || [[word:jatavo|jatavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatavofoth|jatavofoth]] || [[word:jatavofoj|jatavofoj]] || [[word:jatavofosh|jatavofosh]] || [[word:jatavof|jatavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jatav忙th忙|jatav忙th忙]] || [[word:jatav忙j忙|jatav忙j忙]] || [[word:jatav忙sh忙|jatav忙sh忙]] || [[word:jatav忙|jatav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jatavathath|jatavathath]] || [[word:jatavajaj|jatavajaj]] || [[word:jatavashash|jatavashash]] || [[word:jatav|jatav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jatavatha|jatavatha]] || [[word:jatavaja|jatavaja]] || [[word:jatavasha|jatavasha]] || [[word:jatava|jatava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jatavafath|jatavafath]] || [[word:jatavafaj|jatavafaj]] || [[word:jatavafash|jatavafash]] || [[word:jatavaf|jatavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jatavasha|jatavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojatavasha|gojatavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijatavasha|gokijatavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jatavn眉sha|jatavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojatavnkn眉sha|gojatavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijatavn眉sha|gokijatavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jatavsh毛sha|jatavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojatavnksh毛sha|gojatavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijatavsh毛sha|gokijatavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatavrosha|jatavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatavnkrosha|gojatavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatavrosha|gokijatavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jatavmusha|jatavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatavnkmusha|gojatavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatavmusha|gokijatavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jatavsherasha|jatavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojatavnksherasha|gojatavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijatavsherasha|gokijatavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jatavngasha|jatavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojatavnkngasha|gojatavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijatavngasha|gokijatavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jatavyasha|jatavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojatavnkyasha|gojatavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijatavyasha|gokijatavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jatavyamasha|jatavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojatavnkyamasha|gojatavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijatavyamasha|gokijatavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jatavn眉sh毛sha|jatavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojatavnkn眉sh毛sha|gojatavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijatavn眉sh毛sha|gokijatavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatavn眉rosha|jatavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatavnkn眉rosha|gojatavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatavn眉rosha|gokijatavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jatavn眉musha|jatavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatavnkn眉musha|gojatavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatavn眉musha|gokijatavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jatavsh毛n眉sha|jatavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojatavnksh毛n眉sha|gojatavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijatavsh毛n眉sha|gokijatavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatavsh毛rosha|jatavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatavnksh毛rosha|gojatavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatavsh毛rosha|gokijatavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jatavsh毛musha|jatavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatavnksh毛musha|gojatavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatavsh毛musha|gokijatavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jatavron眉sha|jatavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojatavnkron眉sha|gojatavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijatavron眉sha|gokijatavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jatavrosh毛sha|jatavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojatavnkrosh毛sha|gojatavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijatavrosh毛sha|gokijatavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jatavromusha|jatavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojatavnkromusha|gojatavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijatavromusha|gokijatavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jatavmun眉sha|jatavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojatavnkmun眉sha|gojatavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijatavmun眉sha|gokijatavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jatavmush毛sha|jatavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojatavnkmush毛sha|gojatavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijatavmush毛sha|gokijatavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jatavmurosha|jatavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojatavnkmurosha|gojatavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijatavmurosha|gokijatavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jatav|jatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:j忙t忙v|j忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojatav|hojatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoj忙t忙v|hoj忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojatav|hohojatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoj忙t忙v|hohoj忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉jatav|n眉jatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉j忙t忙v|n眉j忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉jatav|n眉n眉jatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉j忙t忙v|n眉n眉j忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂jatav|n茂jatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂j忙t忙v|n茂j忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂jatav|n茂n茂jatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂j忙t忙v|n茂n茂j忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujatav|lujatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luj忙t忙v|luj忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujatav|lulujatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluj忙t忙v|luluj忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijatav|lijatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lij忙t忙v|lij忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijatav|lilijatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilij忙t忙v|lilij忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojatav|kojatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koj忙t忙v|koj忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojatav|kokojatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoj忙t忙v|kokoj忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejatav|kejatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kej忙t忙v|kej忙t忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejatav|kekejatav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekej忙t忙v|kekej忙t忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
